prompt:
This PR has merge conflicts with main after earlier PRs were merged. Rebase onto main and resolve all conflicts.

The PR adds Prowlarr indexer management tools (enable_indexer, update_indexer_priority, delete_indexer, test_all_indexers). The conflicts are likely in:
- internal/agent/tools.go (tool definitions)
- internal/agent/agent.go (dispatchTool switch cases)
- internal/prowlarr/client.go (Client interface)
- internal/prowlarr/types.go

After rebasing:
1. Run 'go build ./...' to verify compilation
2. Run 'make test' or 'go test ./...' to verify tests pass  
3. Push with 'git push --force-with-lease'
